'''âw-r-sh''' ('''kawarash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:coeducate|coeducate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-r-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coeducate|coeducate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-r-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kawarash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwarash|thiwarash]] || [[word:jiwarash|jiwarash]] || [[word:shiwarash|shiwarash]] || [[word:kiwarash|kiwarash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwarash|thuthuwarash]] || [[word:jujuwarash|jujuwarash]] || [[word:shushuwarash|shushuwarash]] || [[word:kukuwarash|kukuwarash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwarash|thuwarash]] || [[word:juwarash|juwarash]] || [[word:shuwarash|shuwarash]] || [[word:kuwarash|kuwarash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwarash|thuwarash]] || [[word:juwarash|juwarash]] || [[word:shuwarash|shuwarash]] || [[word:kuwarash|kuwarash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewarash|thewarash]] || [[word:jewarash|jewarash]] || [[word:shewarash|shewarash]] || [[word:kewarash|kewarash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowarash|thothowarash]] || [[word:jojowarash|jojowarash]] || [[word:shoshowarash|shoshowarash]] || [[word:kokowarash|kokowarash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowarash|thowarash]] || [[word:jowarash|jowarash]] || [[word:showarash|showarash]] || [[word:kowarash|kowarash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowarash|thowarash]] || [[word:jowarash|jowarash]] || [[word:showarash|showarash]] || [[word:kowarash|kowarash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwarash|thĂŠwarash]] || [[word:jĂŠwarash|jĂŠwarash]] || [[word:shĂŠwarash|shĂŠwarash]] || [[word:kĂŠwarash|kĂŠwarash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawarash|thathawarash]] || [[word:jajawarash|jajawarash]] || [[word:shashawarash|shashawarash]] || [[word:kakawarash|kakawarash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawarash|thawarash]] || [[word:jawarash|jawarash]] || [[word:shawarash|shawarash]] || [[word:kawarash|kawarash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawarash|thawarash]] || [[word:jawarash|jawarash]] || [[word:shawarash|shawarash]] || [[word:kawarash|kawarash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawarash|shawarash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawarash|goshawarash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawarash|gokishawarash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawarashnĂŒ|shawarashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawarashnknĂŒ|goshawarashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawarashnĂŒ|gokishawarashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawarashĂ«|shawarashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawarashnkshĂ«|goshawarashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawarashĂ«|gokishawarashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawarashro|shawarashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawarashnkro|goshawarashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawarashro|gokishawarashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawarashmu|shawarashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawarashnkmu|goshawarashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawarashmu|gokishawarashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawarasher|shawarasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawarashnksher|goshawarashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawarasher|gokishawarasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawarashng|shawarashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawarashnkng|goshawarashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawarashng|gokishawarashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawarashya|shawarashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawarashnkya|goshawarashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawarashya|gokishawarashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawarashyam|shawarashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawarashnkyam|goshawarashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawarashyam|gokishawarashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawarashnĂŒshĂ«|shawarashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawarashnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawarashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawarashnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawarashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawarashnĂŒro|shawarashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawarashnknĂŒro|goshawarashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawarashnĂŒro|gokishawarashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawarashnĂŒmu|shawarashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawarashnknĂŒmu|goshawarashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawarashnĂŒmu|gokishawarashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawarashĂ«nĂŒ|shawarashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawarashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawarashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawarashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawarashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawarashĂ«ro|shawarashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawarashnkshĂ«ro|goshawarashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawarashĂ«ro|gokishawarashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawarashĂ«mu|shawarashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawarashnkshĂ«mu|goshawarashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawarashĂ«mu|gokishawarashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawarashronĂŒ|shawarashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawarashnkronĂŒ|goshawarashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawarashronĂŒ|gokishawarashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawarashroshĂ«|shawarashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawarashnkroshĂ«|goshawarashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawarashroshĂ«|gokishawarashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawarashromu|shawarashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawarashnkromu|goshawarashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawarashromu|gokishawarashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawarashmunĂŒ|shawarashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawarashnkmunĂŒ|goshawarashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawarashmunĂŒ|gokishawarashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawarashmushĂ«|shawarashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawarashnkmushĂ«|goshawarashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawarashmushĂ«|gokishawarashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawarashmuro|shawarashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawarashnkmuro|goshawarashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawarashmuro|gokishawarashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
